title: [FIRRTL] infer width (core dump)
body:
The following FIRRTL program:

```python
circuit top_mod :
  module top_mod :
    output tmp56: UInt<10>
    tmp56 <= dshl(UInt<9>("o741"), UInt("o0"))
```

Compiled with `firtool a_top_mod.fir --lower-to-hw --lower-types --expand-whens --infer-widths --lowering-options=noAlwaysFF --verilog -o=a_top_mod_new.v` fails with the following core dump:

```
firtool: ../lib/Dialect/FIRRTL/Transforms/InferWidths.cpp:420: {anonymous}::ConstraintSolver::solve()::<lambda(auto:25*)> [with auto:25 = {anonymous}::PowExpr]::<lambda(int32_t)>: Assertion `arg < 32' failed.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://bugs.llvm.org/ and include the crash backtrace.
Stack dump:
0.      Program arguments: ../../llvm/circt/build/bin/firtool a_top_mod.fir --lower-to-hw --lower-types --expand-whens --infer-widths --lowering-options=noAlwaysFF --mlir-timing --verilog -o=a_top_mod_new.v
1.       #0 0x000000000048525d llvm::sys::PrintStackTrace(llvm::raw_ostream&, int) (../../llvm/circt/build/bin/firtool+0x48525d)
 #1 0x0000000000483094 llvm::sys::RunSignalHandlers() (../../llvm/circt/build/bin/firtool+0x483094)
 #2 0x00000000004831f3 SignalHandler(int) (../../llvm/circt/build/bin/firtool+0x4831f3)

 #6 0x0000000004c9b749 _nl_load_domain.cold (/lib64/libc.so.6+0x26749)
 #7 0x0000000004caa9b6 (/lib64/libc.so.6+0x359b6)
 #8 0x00000000005a2666 auto (anonymous namespace)::ConstraintSolver::solve()::'lambda0'(auto*)::operator()<(anonymous namespace)::PowExpr>(auto*) const::'lambda'(int)::operator()(int) const /home/drom/work/github/llvm/circt/build/../lib/Dialect/FIRRTL/Transforms/InferWidths.cpp:421:25
 #9 0x00000000005adcc0 auto std::__invoke_impl<int, auto (anonymous namespace)::ConstraintSolver::solve()::'lambda0'(auto*)::operator()<(anonymous namespace)::PowExpr>(auto*) const::'lambda'(int)&, int>(std::__invoke_other, auto (anonymous namespace)::ConstraintSolver::solve()::'lambda0'(auto*)::operator()<(anonymous namespace)::PowExpr>(auto*) const::'lambda'(int)&, int&&) /usr/include/c++/10/bits/invoke.h:60:70
#10 0x00000000005ab946 _ZSt10__invoke_rIiRZZN12_GLOBAL__N_116ConstraintSolver5solveEvENKUlPT_E0_clINS0_7PowExprEEEDaS3_EUliE_JiEENSt9enable_ifIXsrSt6__and_IJSt6__not_ISt7is_voidIS2_EESt14is_convertibleINSt15__invoke_resultIT0_JDpT1_EE4typeES2_EEE5valueES2_E4typeEOSH_DpOSI_ /usr/include/c++/10/bits/invoke.h:143:5
#11 0x00000000005a8b5a std::_Function_handler<int (int), auto (anonymous namespace)::ConstraintSolver::solve()::'lambda0'(auto*)::operator()<(anonymous namespace)::PowExpr>(auto*) const::'lambda'(int)>::_M_invoke(std::_Any_data const&, int&&) /usr/include/c++/10/bits/std_function.h:293:7
#12 0x00000000005b2c5e std::function<int (int)>::operator()(int) const /usr/include/c++/10/bits/std_function.h:623:5

#26 0x000000000040d126 main /home/drom/work/github/llvm/circt/build/../tools/firtool/firtool.cpp:364:39
#27 0x0000000004c9cb25 __libc_start_main (/lib64/libc.so.6+0x27b25)
#28 0x000000000040bd7e _start /home/abuild/rpmbuild/BUILD/glibc-2.33/csu/../sysdeps/x86_64/start.S:122:0
./process1.sh: line 17: 26057 Aborted                 (core dumped) valgrind -q ../../llvm/circt/build/bin/firtool a_top_mod.fir --lower-to-hw --lower-types --expand-whens --infer-widths --lowering-options=noAlwaysFF --mlir-timing --verilog -o=$VFILE2
```

Compiled with `firrtl-1.5-SNAPSHOT` happily produces this Verilog:

```verilog
module top_mod(
  output [9:0] tmp56
);
  assign tmp56 = 10'h1e1;
endmodule
```
